name: Secret Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions: Beat butter, sugar and vanilla at medium speed of mixer until light and fluffy. Add flour and nuts. Beat at low speed until well blended. Chill dough. Remove foil from kisses. Using about 1 tablespoon of dough, shape around kiss and roll to make a ball. Be sure to cover kiss completely. Place on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes or until cookies are set but not brown. Cool slightly; remove to wire rack. While still warm, roll in powdered sugar. Store in tightly covered container. Roll in sugar again before serving if desired.
